html.p: With Splunk for Oracle Audit Trail application you can analyze your Oracle Audit Trails sent via syslog. It contains predefined field extractions, field value lookups, form searches, charts and reports.
Important - this app uses a dedicated index named "oracleaudit". To search for Oracle Audit Trails be sure to include "index=oracleaudit" in your search.

chart.title: Top audit event types
chart.searchName: Top audit event types - pie chart

chart.title: Top audit event classes
chart.searchName: Top audit event classes - pie chart

table.title: Failed events in the last 24 hours
table.searchName: Failed events in the last 24 hours
